summary: Locks the churn reason for the subscription
description: Locks the churn reason for the subscription. Endpoint: POST /c/{company_id}/billing/subscription/lock_churn_reason. Required parameters: company_id. Optional parameters include locked_churn_reason.

params.name: locked_churn_reason
params.description: The reason for churn to be locked

example_request:
POST /c/{company_id}/billing/subscription/lock_churn_reason

Required params: company_id

Optional params: locked_churn_reason
